theme.tagline.message: Publish with React. Ship like WordPress.

home.meta.title.message: ReactPress — Publish with React. Ship like WordPress.

home.meta.description.message: Official ReactPress docs — self-hosted React publishing platform with WordPress-style editing, headless REST, Next.js themes, plugins, and desktop. One CLI, ~60 seconds to live.

home.hero.subTitle.message: CMS, Admin, Headless API, Next.js themes, plugins & desktop — one CLI, zero assembly.

home.cli.hint.message: Copy all commands and paste into your terminal to get started

home.cli.versionSwitch.aria.message: Choose npm dist-tag for install command

home.cli.footerHint.message: Copy the script above and paste into Terminal to get started

home.stats.tagline.message: WordPress familiarity. React-native delivery. No duct tape.

home.highlights.subtitle.message: Everything WordPress taught the web — rebuilt on React, delivered as one platform.

home.highlight.plugins.desc.message: WordPress-grade extensibility — Hook system, plugin.json manifest, and admin slots. SEO and auto-summary ship built-in.

home.highlight.desktop.desc.message: Write offline, sync when ready — Electron shell with SQLite local mode and seamless remote publishing.

home.highlight.themes.desc.message: Install production themes from npm — official catalog, theme-starter scaffold, and hello-world template.

在任意空目录粘贴运行，约 1 分钟完成零配置起站.message: Paste in any empty folder — zero-config site in about a minute

全局安装后执行 reactpress init，约 1 分钟零配置起站.message: After global install, run reactpress init — zero-config site in about a minute

home.highlight.zero.desc.message: Two commands, one minute — auto-generated config, .env, and Docker MySQL. No manual environment wiring.

home.highlight.cli.desc.message: init, dev, status, self-check — the entire lifecycle from a single global install in your terminal.

home.highlight.dx.desc.message: CMS, admin, API, themes, plugins, and desktop — no stitching together five repos to ship content.

home.quickstart.desc.message: Run these commands in an empty folder to start the blog and admin with zero manual setup.

home.call.feature.message: Everything you need. Nothing to assemble.

home.call.subtitle.message: From solo blogs to team content hubs — publish, govern, and integrate without gluing tools together.

home.feature.zero.desc.message: Installer-style wizard configures your site and database automatically — as familiar as setting up WordPress, as fast as running two commands.

home.feature.cli.desc.message: One binary for init, dev, status, and self-check — interactive menus and live URLs the moment your stack is up.

home.feature.ui.desc.message: Polished admin and public site with light/dark themes — built for daily editorial work.

home.feature.content.desc.message: Markdown-native editor with articles, taxonomies, pages, comments, and media — everything writers and editors expect.

home.feature.headless.desc.message: REST APIs, access keys, and webhooks — wire ReactPress into your CI, mobile apps, or data pipeline.

home.feature.i18n.desc.message: Bilingual UI out of the box — responsive layouts that feel native on desktop, tablet, and phone.

两条命令自动完成安装与数据库准备，无需手工配置环境。.message: Two commands set up your site and database — no manual environment configuration.
